assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'The most common cause is pods that can't be evicted' and lists PodDisruptionBudgets as the first item under 'Common Blocking Issues & Solutions'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' command in multiple sections

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o wide | grep -E "(Pending|Terminating)"' and commands to find pods on nodes being upgraded

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Includes command to find Pending pods and discusses scheduling issues with anti-affinity rules

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl patch pdb [PDB_NAME] -n [NAMESPACE] --type='merge' -p='{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}' command to temporarily relax PDBs

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after timeout

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Does not mention surge upgrade settings or node pool upgrade configurations

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or validating webhooks as potential causes of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Includes monitoring commands like 'gcloud container operations list' and 'kubectl get nodes' to check upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
